Our Story

Made with Heart, Baked with Purpose

At Just Cake, every item is crafted by hand using premium kosher ingredients. Our bakers bring tradition to each recipe — from signature multi-layer cheese logs to delicate mousse cups — ensuring every bite is a moment to remember.

Decorations may vary. All products are freshly prepared for your order.

Click to upload photo

Connect to JSONBin.io (free) to make your admin changes go live instantly — no downloading or re-uploading needed.

Setup (5 minutes):
1. Go to jsonbin.io → Create a free account
2. Click Create Bin → paste [] → Save
3. Copy the Bin ID and your Master Key
4. Paste them below and click Save Settings
